description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly black mesh and synthetic upper with distinctive design elements. The shoe has a visible white 'AIR' text on the lateral side, a red zip-tie tag attached to the laces, and a gray overlay near the toe box. The lacing system is complex, with multiple eyelets and a layered construction, and the tongue is padded with a visible branded label. The midsole is thick and robust, designed for comfort and support, while the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. The overall design is bold and urban, with contrasting accents and a deconstructed aesthetic typical of high-end streetwear collaborations.
description: A black athletic sneaker with white 'AIR' text, red zip-tie tag, and layered mesh and synthetic construction, featuring a thick sole and bold urban design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel, 'AIR' text, and the red zip-tie tag extending outward.
description_view_1: Lateral side view highlighting the 'AIR' text, layered construction, and the full length of the red zip-tie tag.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the toe box, lacing system, and padded tongue with visible branding.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view showing the complex lacing, overlays, and the interplay of black, gray, and red accents.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on the lateral side, partially visible under overlays
attribute_lacing_style: standard criss-cross with additional decorative zip-tie
